quotes: Fundamental analysis is crucial prior to investment.
You can track your all investments under one bucket.
Informative and easy to use application, a must recommend for people who want to invest simply.
weekly_note: The users are generally satisfied with the app's user-friendly interface, ease of use, and good features. However, some users have reported issues with the app's performance, such as delays in placing orders and glitches. Additionally, some users have suggested features that are not currently available, such as stop loss triggers and mutual fund options.
action_ideas: Improve app performance to reduce delays and glitches
Add stop loss triggers and mutual fund options
Enhance user interface for better accessibility
